日前，蘇超勁旅些路迪舉行咗年度最佳球員既頒獎典禮，而該隊既教練羅渣士就喺台上致詞既時候，挑選咗自己遇過既最強球員。令人意想既係，羅帥所揀既球員，並唔係些路迪今季既主力射手穆沙丹比利，亦都唔係任何既些路迪球員喎？

到底羅渣士揀咗邊個？佢係一位曾經效力過利物浦既球員，效力紅軍個陣唔係受到太大既重用既姐，就係巴洛迪利啦！

羅渣士咁講：「我遇過既最佳球員？巴洛迪利啦，佢真係一係好出色既球員，而且擁有無比的足球天賦，係一位難得一遇既天才。」

此言一出，台下即時傳來一陣既笑聲，因為羅渣士同「巴神」只係合作過一季，而呢位意大利國腳喺羅帥麾下既紅軍，只係斬獲咗一球英超入波姐，狀態、表現同效率都未達眾人既預期，最終喺舊年夏天俾利物浦放棄，依家就去咗法甲既尼斯搵食。

今輪聯賽，利物浦將於主場出戰強敵修咸頓，而紅軍教練高普則於賽前的記者會上，特意提到上週攻入「世界波」的弟子安利簡。

高普說：「顯然地，安利簡是一位能夠持續進步的球員，而他進步最大的地方就是倒掛了（笑）！」

「眾所周知，我十分喜歡安利簡，他擁有無比的拼勁和爭勝心，而且發展空間巨大，所以一眾的教練和利物浦的團隊，均會樂意看到這位德國中場完成續約。事實上，我們正商討續約，而且進展良好。」

與此同時，高普更在記者會上，確認隊長佐敦軒達臣繼續休戰的消息，意味著這名英格蘭中場或可能無緣於今季內復出。

As recent as Wednesday, the Spanish giants were said to be considering a players-plus-cash move for the 24-year-old.

And with the Brazilian’s international team-mate, Neymar, also talking up a move for Liverpool’s No. 10 in March, the writing may seem to be on the wall.

But according to Sky Sports‘ La Liga correspondent Guillem Balague, this is not the case, as he refuted suggestions of Barcelona’s interest.

He did, however, claim that Coutinho would be “willing to go” if Barcelona made an approach to Liverpool.

“There are more stories coming out that Barcelona want Coutinho and he is willing to go,” he said.

“I have no doubt he is willing to go, but Barcelona are not after him.

“It’s just moves the agents are making to try to convince Barcelona to move for him. But they do not want him.”

Balague does have a point in painting the latest links between Coutinho and Barcelona as agent talk.

The playmaker’s representative, Kia Joorabchian, is said to have held talks with the club, with the 45-year-old notorious in his dealings in the past.

Funnelling reports of interest in Coutinho to the Spanish press would no doubt benefit Joorabchian, as would be the case with his new five-year, £150,000-a-week Liverpool contract.

However, Balague has certainly made some questionable calls in recent months, including the Reds’ rumoured interest in both James Rodriguez and Inaki Williams.

Given the intensity of speculation over a future move to the Nou Camp for Coutinho, it would be fair to assume there is no smoke without fire.

Naby Keita, Jurgen Klopp’s top midfield transfer target this summer, has not ruled out a move away from RB Leipzig at the end of the season.

And while the Guinea international says he is “comfortable” at his current club, he admits he will discuss his future at the end of the campaign.


The 22-year-old has been a revelation for the Bundesliga club this season, attracting attention from a number of Europe’s top clubs.

Liverpool are one of those, although they appreciate Champions League football will be needed to tempt him to Anfield.

“I’m very comfortable at Leipzig,” he said. “There are still three games to go, that’s what I’m concentrating on. My agent takes care of everything else.

“When it’s time, I’ll discuss it with him and my family.”
